P

passesEntrantPrivateListVisibility(Event, Set<String>) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterUtils
Determines whether a private event should be visible to the entrant on the home list.

postNotification(Context, String, String, int) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.MyFirebaseMessagingService
High-importance heads-up style alert for organizer / lottery / invite messaging.

PRIVATE_INVITE_TITLE - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationHelper
Title/body for the private event invite notification (US 01.05.06).
PROMOTIONAL_QR_URI_PREFIX - Static variable in class com.example.eventlottery.QRCodeActivity
Prefix for promotional QR payloads; must match scanner parsing in the entrant scan flow.
